location: Purchased from Pidia, Carian Servant, for 3,500 Runes. Pidia is found on a balcony above the Manor Lower Level grace, on the hidden floor of Caria Manor accessible after defeating Royal Knight Loretta at Three Sisters.
tactics: Requires clearing Caria Manor up to Three Sisters and defeating Royal Knight Loretta first — Pidia isn't reachable before then
From the Three Sisters entrance, head to Seluvis' Rise, descend the cliff near a Cerulean Tear Scarab, and follow the route down a ladder to reach Pidia's balcony
If Pidia's Bell Bearing is later obtained and given to the Twin Maiden Husks, the Ripple Blade can also be bought at Roundtable Hold instead of returning here
lore: A blade shaped like rippling water, carried by young Albinaurics as a symbol of the ripples in a lake believed to be the origin of their kind.

builds.name: Pure Arcane status build
builds.why: Scales entirely with Arcane (A, upgrading to S at +3) instead of Strength/Dexterity — a rare case of an axe becoming a full Arcane status weapon without needing Occult infusion.

builds.name: Bleed/Poison/Sleep hybrid
builds.why: High Arcane scaling combined with strong status buildup makes it excel at stacking Bleed, Poison, or Sleep quickly on a high-Arcane character.
